untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of mean-reverting behavior (half_life parameter) and statistical confirmation of mean reversion, which cannot be expressed with the allowed indicators and operators. The threshold and half_life parameters are marked AUTHOR_SILENT, making precise rule definition impossible. Mean reversion detection typically requires autocorrelation analysis or Ornstein-Uhlenbeck model fitting, neither of which are available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted basic interpretation: entry on negative returns (previous period decline) with mean reversion assumption. However, without explicit mean reversion metrics (half-life, autocorrelation tests, or Hurst exponent), this rule cannot be properly validated. The exit condition AUTHOR_SILENT was interpreted as mean reversion completion (returns crossing above 0), but this is speculative without author guidance.
